testcase.name: WrongLoginUser

failure.message: expected [Your account has exceeded allowed number of login attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.] but found [Warning: Your account has exceeded allowed number of login attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Your account has exceeded allowed number of login attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.] but found [Warning: Your account has exceeded allowed number of login attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.] at com.test.DataDrivenTestDemo.WrongLoginUser(DataDrivenTestDemo.java:66) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 31 stack frames
